/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++14 -Wno-deprecated-register -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/Card.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/CardSet.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/CardSetGenerators.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/DeuceToSevenHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/HoldemHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/OmahaEightHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/OmahaHighHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/PokerEvaluation.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/PokerHand.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/PokerHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/Rank.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/SpecializedHandEvaluators.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/Suit.test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/peval_tests.dir/UniversalHandEvaluator.test.cpp.o -o ../../../../bin/peval_tests  ../../../../lib/libpeval.a ../../../../lib/libgtest.a ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../../lib/libgtest.a
